description: Part 1 - Core Infrastructure and Phase Engine. Creates the foundation MQL5 file with: series buffers, input parameters, global state variables, helper functions (ATR, pivots, new bar detection), the complete 4-phase curvature-based phase engine from Symphony (impulse detection, phase transitions 1-4 for both long/short, flipzone/inducement logic, pre-convexity flags), and the ARC v2 convexity calculation. This is the Symphony base minus the risk engine.
steps: Include the MQL5 property header and Trade library include
Port the series buffer system from Symphony (RefreshSeries with gCloseSeries/gHighSeries/gLowSeries/gTimeSeries, #define macros)

Define all input parameters: Core Engine (PivotLen, ATRLen, ImpulseAtrMult, RetrMin, RetrMax, InducLookbackBars, InducZoneATRWidth), ARC v2 (ArcHorizonBars, ConvPower, ArcExtMult), ARC Exit Controls (OuterBandAtrMult, ArcToleranceAtr), Trading Layer (RiskPercent, Magic), Timing (TargetGMT)

Define all global state variables for the phase engine: pivot history (g_lastPivotPrice/Dir/Shift, g_prevPivotPrice/Dir/Shift), impulse/mode (g_mode, g_anchorHigh/Low/Shift), phases (g_phaseShort/Long, g_prevPhaseShort/Long), flipzone/inducement (g_shortInducPrice/Low/High, g_longInducPrice/Low/High), pre-conv flags, ARC state, outer-band sweep flags, bar detection vars
Implement helper functions: IsNewBar(), GetATR(shift), GetATRSmooth(shift, len), IsPivotHigh(c), IsPivotLow(c), IsTradeTime() with London+US session windows

Implement UpdatePhaseEngine() - the complete 4-phase state machine including: pivot detection at centerShift, SHORT impulse detection (high->low exceeding ATR*mult), LONG impulse detection (low->high), pivot history persistence, impulse invalidation logic, phase calculation for short side (retracement fraction mapping to phases 1-4 with inducement zone checks and pre-conv gating), phase calculation for long side (mirror), previous phase tracking
Implement UpdateARC() - convexity arc calculation for both long (from anchorLow projected high) and short (from anchorHigh projected low) using power-curve formula with horizon normalization
acceptance_criteria: All input parameters are defined with appropriate types and default values matching Symphony
Phase engine logic correctly implements the 4-phase state machine with all guards (retracement bounds, inducement zone check, pre-convexity gating)
ARC calculation uses the convexity power formula with proper time normalization
Code compiles syntactically as valid MQL5 (C-like syntax, proper semicolons, braces, types)
verification: Read the output file and verify it contains all required sections
Check that function signatures match MQL5 conventions (return types, parameter types)
Verify the phase state machine has all transition conditions from Symphony
findings: File created at 555 lines. All braces/parens balanced. Contains: RefreshSeries, 13 input parameters, all global state vars, 6 helper functions, UpdatePhaseEngine (complete 4-phase state machine with impulse detection, pivot persistence, invalidation, flipzone/inducement zones, pre-convexity gating), UpdateARC (convexity arc for long/short). Verified exclusions: no DRDWCT, no trading execution, no OnInit/OnTick/OnDeinit.
